protocol.prompt: Write four short bullet points about local MoE inference on a laptop.
protocol.without: transformers · cpu · float16 · greedy decode loop
protocol.with: kestrel-engine dense · int8 weights · NEON IDOT when available
protocol.note: Earlier short-prompt runs that timed transformers generate() end-to-end vs engine decode-only inflated the Kestrel delta; this protocol matches metrics.

runs.text:
- Install the latest version of the MoE inference software.
- Ensure your laptop meets the minimum system requirements.
- Configure the inference settings to optimize performance.
- Test the inference on a variety of tasks to ensure accurac
